name: esports-hub-india
description: Unified Monorepo for Frontend and Backend deployment on Render

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.sync: git add . && git commit -m "Auto-sync project updates" && git push origin master:main
